description: Rate-limit evidence and retry-policy scenarios for linear-transport-errors (CONTEXT D-21; T-01-40). rateLimitSignal proves normalizeRateLimit's exact allowlist; retryScenarios proves decideRetry permits only a bounded read/server_error retry and returns a typed stop-write decision for any rate-limited or partial mutation.

rateLimitSignal.authorization: should never be read or echoed by normalizeRateLimit

retryScenarios.name: read server_error retries a second time still within bound
read server_error stops once the bound is exhausted
read rate_limited never retries even on the first attempt
read partial never retries even on the first attempt
create mutation observing rate_limited stops the write immediately
update mutation observing partial stops the write immediately
create mutation observing server_error never retries and is not a stop_write
update mutation observing rate_limited on a later attempt still stops the write, not a retry
